top_complaints.verbatim: [Bug] Cron tasks marked as lost after gateway restart — activeJobIds not persisted

top_complaints.verbatim: After npm build, openclaw daemon --start launches the old binary. No warning.

top_praises.evidence: 369k stars, 76k forks, 35k commits in 90 days -- community clearly values the pace
Explicit in README as primary differentiator; high community interest in channel additions

notes: G2/Capterra/Reddit not checked -- out of scope for this analysis focus. GitHub issues are the primary user-voice source for an open-source project.
